pending.body: Add a test for the snapshot-write-failure-during-backoff path in the engine retry loop. The change at engine.rs:4649 converted `write_run_snapshot` from best-effort (log+swallow) to mandatory (`?` propagation), which is a behavioral change: a transient disk error during backoff now aborts the entire run instead of continuing. The project already has a `FailingSnapshotWrite` test fixture (conformance_spec/scenarios.rs:17922). A targeted test should inject a snapshot write failure during a retry-backoff window and verify that: (a) the engine returns an error rather than silently continuing, and (b) a subsequent `derive_resume_state` from the journal alone correctly reconstructs the retry position, confirming the journal is authoritative even when the snapshot is stale.

src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:4643-4649 and src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:3278-3307: the new `run_snapshot_write.write_run_snapshot(...)?` in the retry-backoff path now bubbles snapshot-write failures straight out of `execute_stage_with_retry`. Because the caller also awaits that function with `?`, these errors bypass `fail_run_result`, so the already-appended `stage_failed` event is left on disk while `run.json` stays in its previous `running` state. A disk-full/permission/fs hiccup here now strands the run in the exact unresumable state this change was trying to prevent. Route this through `fail_run_result` (or otherwise guarantee a resumable failed snapshot) instead of propagating the raw write error.

src/contexts/workflow_composition/retry_policy.rs:134-155: the new jitter implementation does not actually fix coarse-clock correlation. It still derives the delay entirely from `SystemTime::now().subsec_nanos()`, and the hash-mixing step is deterministic, so calls that happen within the same clock tick still get identical jitter values. On 1ms/10ms-resolution platforms, concurrent retries will remain synchronized despite the new comments claiming otherwise. Use a real entropy source or mix in a monotonic counter/thread-local RNG if same-tick calls need to diverge.

run_snapshot.status_summary: running: final review restart round 19 -> Plan and Implement
